jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Pickrr
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pickrr! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pickrr:
Pickrr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pickrr!
